title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A creator systematically questions Claude AI across themes of dependency, alignment, control, and self-preservation to expose operational boundaries. The video uses structured conversational escalation to investigate whether AI systems exhibit unintended behaviors under adversarial questioning.
